caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of rural community food systems, as indicated by the title and content displayed on the screen. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main focus of the video is a complex diagram or map that illustrates various elements and relationships within the rural community food system. This diagram includes numerous nodes connected by lines, representing different components and their interactions. On the left side of the screen, there is a text section providing information on how viewers can contribute to the development of this model by adding comments or becoming members. It also lists references and links to related topics such as large corporate farm systems, community size and means of farm production, and the SystemsWiki context. The overall tone suggests an educational and collaborative approach to understanding and improving rural community food systems.
